notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Eldridge singles on a ground ball to second baseman Nico Hoerner. Bryce Eldridge to 2nd. Bryce Eldridge advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Nico Hoerner.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Javier Assad on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert grounds into a double play, first baseman Michael Busch to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Matt Chapman out at 2nd. Drew Gilbert out at 1st.
